acceptance_criteria: Search for 'gargron@mastodon.social' with resolve=true fetches and returns the remote account; hashtag search returns matching tags with usage counts; account search returns matching local accounts; statuses type returns empty array; limit param respected
description: Implement search for accounts and hashtags. Full-text post search is deferred to v2. Account search: look up by username (local and remote, resolve if not cached). Hashtag search: match post_tags table. Type param: 'accounts', 'statuses' (return []), 'hashtags'. q param is the search query. resolve=true param triggers remote actor resolution for @user@domain queries.
design: Search response: {accounts:[], statuses:[], hashtags:[]}. Hashtag: {name, url, history:[]}. history can be empty array. Account search: LIKE query on local accounts, resolve remote if resolve=true and looks like @user@domain. Order: local accounts first.
title: GET /api/v2/search — account and hashtag search
